GET /health.description: Health probe — 200/503 with per-component status (database, immich optional). Used by docker-compose healthcheck curl.

POST /:botToken.description: Grammy webhookCallback mount (webhook mode only) — dispatches Telegram updates to bot handlers when config.webhookUrl is set. Path is bot.token to prevent spoofing.

GET /oauth2callback.description: Google OAuth redirect URI (config.googleRedirectUri default). OAuth code flow is completed manually via /sync command — user pastes the code into Telegram; no dedicated HTTP route is registered to accept it server-side.

TELEGRAM /sync.description: Trigger/interrogate background sync. Without args shows formatted sync_status per source. With source name triggers that sync. Handles OAuth code exchange when bot is awaiting one.

TELEGRAM /decisions.description: Decision archive dashboard + management. No-args renders dashboard; stats shows Wilson CI accuracy; suppress/unsuppress manages trigger phrase denylist; reclassify re-runs 2-axis classification sequentially.

TELEGRAM /summary.description: Returns an episodic daily summary. Date in future → short-circuit message; no row → friendly 'no summary' text; DB error → generic localized error. Plain text (no Markdown).

TELEGRAM message:text.description: Generic text handler routed through chris/engine.processMessage — OAuth-code interception > decision capture flow > mode detection (journal/interrogate/reflect/coach/psychology/produce/photos) > reply.

TELEGRAM message:document.description: Extracts text from uploaded documents (PDF via pdf-parse, HTML via html-to-text, plain text) and stores verbatim in pensieve_entries with embeddings.

CRON sync.all.description: Every 6 hours: Gmail → Drive → Immich sequentially. OAuthError = skip (not error); other failures notify user via bot.api.sendMessage. Toggled by SYNC_ENABLED.

CRON proactive.sweep.description: Dual-channel proactive messaging. Accountability channel (deadline → AWAITING_RESOLUTION) fires first; reflective channel Phase 1 (silence+commitment SQL) then Phase 2 (Opus pattern+thread) with priority-based winner. Global mute gates both.

CRON episodic.consolidate.description: Daily episodic summary for the PRIOR calendar day. Sonnet consolidates pensieve entries + contradictions + decisions. Idempotent via UNIQUE(summary_date) + pre-flight SELECT + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. Entry-count gate short-circuits empty days.
